Reports

Trend Charts

Line trend for selected market+commodity. Bar chart shows latest prices across markets for the selected commodity.

Price Trend

Latest Price Across Markets

Candlestick (OHLC)

Candlestick built from daily OHLC derived from entries. Works even with one observation per day.

Market Compare

Compares latest available price per market for the selected commodity (latest-price method).

MarketPriceUnitDate Used

Arbitrage Analysis

Uses latest available price per market for the selected commodity to compute cheapest vs most expensive markets.
